name: Springtime Steak Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain tomatoes, reserving 2 teaspoons oil; cut tomatoes in half.
2. Brush steak with reserved oil and sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon salad dressing mix.
3. Reserve remaining dressing mix for Italian Dijon Dressing.
4. Grill steak, covered with grill lid, over medium coals (300° to 350°) 8 to 11 minutes on each side.
5. Cool and cut steak into strips.
6. Toss beef, tomato, mushrooms, salad greens, and, if desired, artichoke hearts in a large bowl.
7. Drizzle with 1/3 cup Italian Dijon Dressing; serve immediately.
